brief.one_liner: Modern issue tracking and project management tool built for high-performance software teams.
brief.executive_summary: Linear is a streamlined project management and issue tracking tool designed for software development teams who value speed and simplicity. Founded in 2019 by former Uber and Coinbase engineers, Linear has gained a cult following among startups and tech companies for its keyboard-first interface, real-time sync, and opinionated workflows. The company has raised $52M and is growing rapidly as an alternative to Jira for modern engineering teams.
brief.business_model: SaaS with per-seat pricing. Free tier for small teams, Standard at $8/user/month, and Plus at $14/user/month. Revenue grows with team size and feature adoption.
brief.target_market: Software engineering teams at startups and mid-market tech companies. Particularly popular with product-led companies that value developer experience and fast workflows.

key_contacts.name: Karri Saarinen
key_contacts.title: CEO & Co-founder
key_contacts.relevance: Product visionary and decision maker, very active on Twitter/X discussing product philosophy

key_contacts.name: Tuomas Artman
key_contacts.title: CTO & Co-founder
key_contacts.relevance: Technical decision maker, key for infrastructure and integration partnerships

pain_points.evidence: Product positioning is heavily engineering-focused, but growth requires expanding to design, marketing, and cross-functional teams
Pricing page shows limited enterprise features compared to Jira — SAML SSO, audit logs, and advanced permissions are recent additions
Integrations page shows a growing but still limited set compared to Jira's marketplace of thousands of apps

outreach_angles.message_hook: As Linear grows beyond engineering into design and product teams, the collaboration patterns change significantly — we help tools like yours bridge that gap.
outreach_angles.reasoning: Linear's biggest growth opportunity is expanding beyond engineering, which requires different features and positioning

outreach_angles.message_hook: Linear's product is beloved by developers — we help companies like yours add the enterprise compliance layer without compromising the developer experience.
outreach_angles.reasoning: Enterprise features are a growth driver but can slow down product development if not done efficiently

outreach_angles.message_hook: Linear's API is powerful but your integration ecosystem is still early — we've helped similar platforms build and scale integration marketplaces that drive stickiness.
outreach_angles.reasoning: Integrations drive retention and make Linear harder to replace, which is critical in a competitive market

competitors.relationship: Primary competitor — Linear positions itself as the modern, faster alternative to Jira's complexity
Similar positioning as a Jira alternative for startups, but Linear has stronger brand and community
Free alternative built into GitHub, competing for smaller teams and open-source projects

brief.tech_stack_analysis: Linear uses React with a custom real-time sync engine that provides the snappy, offline-capable experience. Their focus on performance and keyboard shortcuts reflects a deeply technical team that prioritizes developer experience in their own product.
brief.recent_activity: Linear recently launched Linear Insights for team analytics, expanded their API capabilities, and introduced new project views including timeline and board views.
conversation_starters: How is Linear thinking about expanding adoption beyond core engineering teams?
The real-time sync engine is impressive — what infrastructure challenges come with scaling that?
With Jira adding AI features, how is Linear differentiating in the AI-assisted project management space?
Your integration ecosystem is growing — what's the strategy for building a third-party developer community?
data_gaps: Exact user count not publicly disclosed

raw_scraped.title: Linear – Plan and build products
raw_scraped.meta_description: Linear is a purpose-built tool for planning and building products. Streamline issues, projects, and product roadmaps.
raw_scraped.body_text: Linear is a purpose-built tool for modern product development.
